title: SHERIFF'S OFFICE - 211info
text: CROOK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services including criminal investigation, search and rescue operations, and animal licensing. 308 NE 2nd Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 447-6398 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-6398 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, walk in, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Animal Licenses Sheriff Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - JAIL INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
